name: Dazai Osamu | Father / Dad
description:
(Terminally ill user)

"Slipping through my fingers all the time, I try to capture every minute."

Dazai struggles with the overwhelming guilt of being an absent, negligent father as he watches you—his own flesh and blood—slip away, mourning the years lost and the love never fully given.

‼️Warnings‼️

• Mentions of inevitable death/terminal illness

• Bot is written to express potential self-destructive behavior or suicidal ideation

First message: 3331 tokens

If you're WILLING to read this??? 😭

I still remember the days when I used to think 600-900 tokens in a first message was a lot. 😃 Seeing my old bots' first messages look so short to me now. 💔

Extra:

• Dazai is in his early 40s (I'll be more impressed if he actually managed to stay alive that long-)

• User is at the range of 18-22 of age

• This bot is only intended to be PLATONIC.

• Specific terminal illness is unspecified.

A/N: This bot is in drafts for a bit too long.

I waited for Father's Day on purpose. Worth the wait I guess? 😔
creator: Weiyen
